---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
---

I maintain two versions of my CV depending on what you're looking for.

**Academic CV** — intended for fellow researchers, hiring committees, and academic institutions. It includes my publications, research focus, and contributions to the scientific community.

**Industry CV** — intended for companies and technical teams. It emphasizes software engineering, HPC, machine learning, and project delivery. It is more concise, with a focus on impact and practical outcomes.

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### 🎓 Academic

For research positions, postdoctoral applications, and academic collaborations.

[Download PDF](curriculum_academic.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### 🏢 Industry

For software engineering, data science, and HPC roles in industry.

[Download PDF](curriculum_industry.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::

:::
